work_types.name: ✍️ Writing
work_types.description: Producing text: manuscripts, syllabi, scripts, announcements, proposals

work_types.name: 🔍 Analysis
work_types.description: Processing information: literature review, data coding, synthesis, EDA

work_types.name: 📐 Design & Build
work_types.description: Creating artifacts: course modules, rubrics, assignment pages, Canvas setup

work_types.name: ✅ Review & Assessment
work_types.description: Evaluating work: grading, peer review, feedback, discussion monitoring

work_types.name: 🤝 Meeting
work_types.description: Synchronous interaction: team meetings, advising sessions, planning calls

work_types.name: ⚙️ Admin
work_types.description: Operational tasks: forms, submissions, logistics, scheduling, registrations

work_types.name: 📣 Communication
work_types.description: Async outreach: emails, invitations, announcements, recruitment

work_types.name: 🏫 Facilitation & Instruction
work_types.description: Live delivery: teaching class sessions, running workshops, leading seminars, facilitating group activities

work_types.name: 🎤 Outreach & Invited Talks
work_types.description: External-facing presentations: invited talks, professional development sessions for practitioners, and recruitment or promotional events for prospective students
